title: Section 11
content: Every member of the Legislative Assembly of 1[the Union territory] shall, before taking his seat, make and subscribe before the Administrator, or some person appointed in that behalf by him, an oath or affirmation according to the form set out for the purpose in the First Schedule.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 18 of 1987, s. 65 for "a Union territory" (w.e.f. 30-5-1987).
